summary: ICP/ckUSDT trading bot project with ICDex integration. Currently deployed (Version 33 in production). Issue with Market Data LIVE section showing zeroed/dash values for Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, and order book levels.
architectural_notes: Market Data LIVE section calls ICDex API (getQuotes or level10) for ICP/ckUSDT price data — currently failing silently causing zeroed values
Build changes should be minimal/focused to avoid budget_exceeded errors
known_issues: Market Data LIVE shows zeroed/dash values for Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy Levels, Sell Levels — ICDex quote fetch failing silently

existing_features.title: Fix the Market Data LIVE section so that Mid Price, Best Bid, Best Ask, Buy Levels, and Sell Levels display real values instead of dashes or zeros. The issue is that the ICDex quote/order-book fetch is failing silently; add proper error surfacing and a retry/fallback so the UI shows either a live value or a clear error message rather than blank dashes.

new_feature_requests.summary: In the backend, ensure the query function that retrieves market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) from the ICDex canister returns a structured error variant when the external call fails rather than returning zero/null silently. Log the failure to the activity log so the operator can diagnose the root cause.
